overall.description: First-person exploration through a sunlit urban waterfront district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks past abandoned vehicles and modern buildings, traverses open plazas with palm trees and wooden stilt structures, ascends metal stairs to an elevated walkway and balcony, then descends back to a wooden deck area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with modern building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a concrete plaza past an abandoned vehicle toward an open waterfront area

entered.detail: damaged blue sedan with open doors and graffiti on the side
large modern building with distinctive teal geometric roof accents and graffiti on walls
tall palm tree visible against the skyline
futuristic high-rise buildings visible in the background haze
small booth structure with umbrella roof on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit urban plaza with a distinctive beige building featuring teal architectural accents. An abandoned blue car sits on the left while the camera moves forward across concrete paving toward an open area with palm trees and distant skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with wooden stilt structures

events.description: transitioning from enclosed plaza into open waterfront promenade with scattered palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing wooden structures on stilts and construction barriers

entered.detail: elevated wooden structure raised on concrete pillars with weathered exterior
elevated highway or monorail track in the distance
red and white striped construction barriers blocking part of the walkway
arched metal roller coaster structure visible against the sky
scattered trash and abandoned items along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Moving into an open waterfront promenade area with palm trees and wooden stilt buildings. The ground transitions to paved tiles with puddles reflecting the sunlight. Construction barriers and debris are scattered around, with a roller coaster track visible in the distant background and an overpass bridge to the right.

events.description: ascending metal stairs to reach upper level walkway
entering covered balcony area with wooden exterior walls and satellite dish

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs with railings to access an elevated walkway and balcony overlooking the plaza

entered.detail: metal staircase with railings leading up to the elevated structure
metal safety railing along the elevated walkway edge
large satellite dish mounted on the side of the wooden building
red wooden door at the top of the stairs leading into the building

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends metal stairs to an elevated walkway attached to the wooden stilt building. Upon reaching the balcony level, the view opens up to overlook the promenade below. A satellite dish is mounted on the building exterior near a red wooden door, while metal railings line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level wooden deck with abandoned vehicle

events.description: descending stairs from balcony back to ground level

agents.ego_description: walking down metal stairs from the balcony and exploring the ground level wooden deck area with abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: abandoned black van parked on the wooden deck with doors closed

entered.detail: dark colored van parked on the wooden decking with tinted windows
stacked shipping containers painted in blue, red, and purple hues

segments.scene_description: Descending from the balcony back to ground level onto a wooden deck area. An abandoned black van is parked prominently in the center, while colorful shipping containers line the left side. The camera moves past the van toward the open deck with palm trees and distant buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban waterfront district that transitions from a concrete plaza to an elevated vantage point and back down to a cluttered deck. It begins by moving past a beige building with teal accents and an abandoned blue car, gliding across concrete paving toward an open area filled with palm trees and distant skyscrapers. As the camera enters the waterfront promenade, the ground shifts to paved tiles with reflective puddles and scattered debris, revealing a distant roller coaster track and a nearby overpass. The scene then ascends a set of metal stairs to an elevated walkway, opening up to a balcony view of the promenade below featuring a satellite dish and a red wooden door. Finally, the camera descends back to ground level onto a wooden deck, passing a prominent abandoned black van and colorful shipping containers before moving toward the open waterfront.
